topics.title: Python Functions
topics.summary: Functions group reusable instructions under a name so that code can be organised and called when needed.
common_mistakes: Calling a function before defining it
Using print when a return value is needed
topics.practice_idea: Create a function that receives two numbers and returns their total.

topics.title: Python Lists
topics.summary: Lists store multiple values in one ordered and changeable collection.
common_mistakes: Using an index that is outside the list
Forgetting that the first index is zero
topics.practice_idea: Create a shopping list and print each item with a for loop.

topics.title: Python Dictionaries
topics.summary: Dictionaries store related information as key-value pairs.
common_mistakes: Trying to access a key that does not exist
Using a mutable value as a dictionary key
topics.practice_idea: Create a dictionary containing a student's name, course and score.

topics.title: Python Exception Handling
topics.summary: Exception handling lets a program respond to expected errors without crashing immediately.
common_mistakes: Catching every error with a bare except
Ignoring an error without explaining or handling it
topics.practice_idea: Ask for a number and handle the error when the user enters text.

topics.title: Python Classes
topics.summary: Classes are blueprints used to create objects that combine data and behaviour.
common_mistakes: Confusing a class with an object created from it
topics.practice_idea: Create a Book class with title and author attributes and a describe method.
